name: Beach Haven Cafe
blurb: Warm, welcoming site for a beachside cafe in South Australia.

detail.business: Beach Haven Cafe is a beloved beachside cafe in South Australia. They needed a site that captured their relaxed, welcoming atmosphere and made it easy for customers to find menus, hours, and get in touch.
detail.built: Built with Next.js and Tailwind CSS, deployed on Vercel. Designed from scratch to reflect the cafe's warm coastal identity with a mobile-first layout.
detail.notable: Every section is purpose-built for the cafe's customers — from menus to a Dog of the Month feature that drives repeat visits and social engagement.

name: Coach Pavle
blurb: High-impact personal brand site for an MMA coach in Canada.

detail.business: Coach Pavle is a professional MMA coach based in the Greater Toronto Area. He needed a site that commanded respect, reflected his coaching philosophy, and converted visitors into serious athletes.
detail.built: Built with Next.js and Tailwind CSS, deployed on Vercel. Dark, bold design with a strong typographic hierarchy that matches the intensity of the sport.
detail.notable: The site establishes Coach Pavle's personal brand with zero fluff — every section is designed to build credibility and drive enquiries from athletes ready to commit.

name: Beach Haven Cafe
blurb: Brand identity and logo suite for a beachside cafe in South Australia.

detail.business: Beach Haven Cafe is a beloved beachside cafe in South Australia. We developed a full brand identity suite to capture their relaxed coastal character across all touchpoints.
detail.built: Delivered a complete logo suite including a circular badge logo, wordmark, and alternate colorways for use across print, digital, and merchandise.
detail.notable: Four logo variants — full color, green wordmark, black, and white — give the cafe flexibility across light and dark backgrounds, uniforms, signage, and packaging.
